display_text: Night Stalker Aghanim's Scepter: Crippling Fear becomes a toggle that drains mana per second after the initial duration. This upgrade counters spell-reliant heroes by maintaining constant silence pressure, forcing enemies to either disengage or fight without abilities.
search_text: Night Stalker Aghanim Scepter anti-spell silence toggle mana drain counter-disable

display_text: Night Stalker Aghanim's Shard: Hunter in the Night can be cast on creeps for instant kill, restoring health and mana. This counters lane pressure and sustain issues, transforming Night Stalker into a self-sufficient jungler who can recover quickly between engagements.
search_text: Night Stalker Aghanim Shard sustain creep kill health mana restore jungle recovery
